backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (SEO meta enrichment and service areas section) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend file's purpose and key contents for the VERDIER COUVERTURE roofing site.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point with geo-targeted meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, canonical link, Google Fonts, and JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data for VERDIER COUVERTURE.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page layout by composing Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Testimonials, Contact, ServiceAreas, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column about section presenting VERDIER COUVERTURE's history since 2004, three value propositions (quality, experience, reactivity), certifications, and a stats grid.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated devis request form, phone/email/address info cards, opening hours, and an emergency CTA, all in French.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer for VERDIER COUVERTURE with brand info, contact details, service links, navigation links, and a bottom bar with copyright. Includes smooth-scroll navigation handlers and a dynamic current year.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, dark overlay, headline, geo-targeted subheadline, highlight badges, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the contact and services sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, mobile hamburger menu, and a phone CTA; changes background opacity on scroll and uses smooth-scroll for all anchor links.
frontend/src/components/ServiceAreas.tsx: SEO-focused section listing ~40 Val-d'Oise cities as a tag cloud and 12 roofing service keywords to communicate VERDIER COUVERTURE's geographic and service coverage.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of six roofing services (réfection, pose de tuiles, réparation, isolation, zinguerie, traitement) each with an image, description, and feature list.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials section with six hardcoded French customer reviews for VERDIER COUVERTURE, displaying star ratings, service type, date, and reviewer initials in a grid layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a warm earthy OKLCH color palette (terracotta, slate, off-white), typography rules using Playfair Display and Inter, and reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH brand colors (terracotta, slate, charcoal), serif/sans font families, box shadows, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's versioned state, implemented features, and architectural notes for the VERDIER COUVERTURE SEO-optimized roofing landing page built with React and Tailwind.
